accessibility.text: Parity conservation was verified in electromagnetic and strong interactions
In 1950s a particle with mass￼ was discovered
Parity conservation was verified in electromagnetic and strong interactions
Sometimes it decayed into two pions ￼, sometimes into three pions ￼
